title: 5 Year Plan for Success to make Kyle Pounds Enterprises International

enrichment.summary: Kyle outlines a five-year plan (2016–2021) for his business 'Kyle Pounds Enterprises International,' structured as ten color-coded six-month segments covering website projects including Google Earth history mapping, a project called Sanctum On, bicycle race pages, politics pages, and timeline work, culminating in general journaling and website cleanup.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Five years is the right length because it divides into ten manageable six-month segments, similar to a semester
Naturally falls into the next project after tidying up the previous one, which he views as a good organic workflow
